prestazioni: F130B 4.7L V12 naturally aspirated engine bored to 5.0L with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (12.0:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft by Pankl Racing Systems for 8,500 RPM redline stability

Custom titanium intake manifold by Novitec with individual throttle bodies (ITBs) and a bespoke Motec M190 ECU managing sequential fuel injection and ignition timing, paired with a dry-sump oil system by Peterson Fluid Systems (8-quart capacity, -12AN fittings)

Titanium 4-2-1 equal-length exhaust headers by Capristo, merging into a straight-pipe exhaust with Inconel 625 tubing and a secondary catalytic converter delete, terminating in a pair of Fabspeed Motorsport carbon fiber quad-tip mufflers with adjustable butterfly valves
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion by GTO Engineering, featuring extended front fenders with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling, a revised rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (adjustable via cockpit switch), and a fixed rear wing with dual-element airfoils (3D-printed titanium endplates)

OMP carbon fiber racing seats with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses, Alcantara-wrapped MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (quick-release hub), and a custom roll cage by Sparco (chromoly steel, TIG-welded, with integrated fire suppression system ports)

BBS LM-R three-piece forged wheels (18x12 front, 18x13 rear) with titanium lug bolts, shod in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (335/30ZR18 front, 345/30ZR18 rear), paired with AP Racing 6-piston monobloc calipers and carbon-ceramic rotors (400mm front, 380mm rear) with titanium pistons
